cases.input: Build a competitor feature matrix and SWOT for our realtime collaboration product vs Figma, Miro, and one more you pick. Note where we differentiate.
We sell forecasting software to mid-market RevOps leads. Draft a positioning statement and a battle card against the spreadsheet status quo and one rules-based rival.
Our onboarding time-to-value is 14 days. Benchmark that against the SaaS industry median and tell me where to focus to close the gap.
Research the company Stripe operating in Brazil: ownership, competitive position, momentum signals, and public contact channels. Deliver a branded HTML report.
We are entering EU cross-border B2B payments. Give me the regulatory matrix, a sector glossary, and the integration rails we must support.
Establish positioning and a message hierarchy for our open methodology product aimed at mid-market data teams drowning in manual reporting. One primary value prop, proof-anchored.
Score these three potential co-marketing partners (an agile-coaching newsletter, a BI consultancy, a competing PM tool) on fit and tell me which to pursue, with kill criteria.
Design a 3-tier pricing page structure for our seat-based SaaS using anchoring and a decoy. Recommend the anchor tier — no concrete prices.
Build me a discounted cash flow model and unit economics for our subscription business.
Recommend the actual dollar amounts for our Starter, Pro, and Enterprise tiers in USD.
Do a deep competitive intelligence pass on the no-code automation market: full feature matrix, tech stacks, SWOT, and differentiation across the top 5 players.
